calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, January 21, 2016, in Department 525:
Gabriel Nicholas Kirchberger, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Zarrin Nina Doraki, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mr. Kirchberger testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit not marked - 11/30/2015 Pacific Specialty Insurance Company e-mail.

Appellant/Defendant, Ms. Doraki testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit not marked - Liberty Mutual Insurance coverage letter, photos.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly unmarked evidence is retained by the Court. .

Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr. ; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Judgment Entered
